question: If more substrate to already occurring enzymatic reaction is added more enzyme activity is seen because:
option1: There is probably more substrate present than there is enzyme
option2: There is probably more enzyme available than there is substrate
option3: There is probably more product present than there is either substrate or enzyme
option4: The enzyme-substrate complex is probably failing to form during the reaction
remarks: Correct answer is "There is probably more enzyme available than there is substrate"
